title: Adding Columns to a single board within a dashboard
excerpt: How can I add a single column to a group without it adding it to the other groups within the dashboard? Every time I add a column to one group it adds it to other groups within the dashboard.

posts.author: SurgeJ (Sergio Mayorga)
posts.cookedHtml: How can I add a single column to a group without it adding it to the other groups within the dashboard? Every time I add a column to one group it adds it to other groups within the dashboard.

posts.author: kaylak (Kayla K)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @SurgeJ

This is expected behavior in Monday.com, but it looks like there is an existing feature request where you can vote and comment your use case, I’ll link that below
Different columns in different groups within one board - #18 by Ster

posts.author: SurgeJ (Sergio Mayorga)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @kaylak Thank you for this insight and the link. I’ll vote on the existing feature request and add my use case to it. I greatly appreciate your help.
